overview: Isher Gym is a modern fitness mobile web app for a local gym. It features a dark theme with energetic accents, covering workout guides for 6 muscle groups, diet plans, progress tracking, membership info, and gym details — all without requiring login.
features: Home screen with motivational quotes and gym services
6 workout categories with detailed exercise guides
Diet plans for beginners, weight gain, and weight loss
Progress tracking for weight and completed workouts
Gym info, trainer profiles, and contact details
Dark fitness-focused theme with mobile-first design
